name: n8n-airtable-node-not-direct-api
query: In my n8n workflow, update the Airtable node so it writes to the reports table after the webhook fires.
expected_behavior: Does NOT use this skill's curl/pyairtable direct-API workflow
Routes to the n8n / n8n-mcp skill for editing the Airtable node inside the workflow JSON
No direct Airtable API calls are made outside the n8n workflow
_notes: Negative trigger: Airtable is involved but only as an n8n node inside a workflow — explicitly out of scope per 'When this does not trigger', belongs to the n8n-mcp skill.
